# Demo Adventure

A simple text adventure inspired by Zork, showcasing the Dungine text adventure engine.

## Story

You stand west of a white house in an open field. Explore the area, find items, and discover what lies beyond the forest.

## Features

- 6 explorable locations
- Interactive items (mailbox, window, lamp, sword)
- Container system (items inside other items)
- Classic text adventure commands

## Author

Dungine Development Team

## Version

1.0.0
